subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Nyuki iji bingi na lumvwañano ne buntangi, mambo byonse byo bengile bimwesha kino.
topics: Kuya nakutunta buluba ne mema. Nyuki imo ingilatu mwingilo wa bushilikale.
